base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of text_font — a ui (menu_screen) from 1989 simcity. Text font — menu + dialog + number glyphs. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Text font — menu + dialog + number glyphs
